mapper.sql: select r.result_id, r.plan_id, r.teacher_id, r.exam_score, r.assessment_type, r.pass_status, r.certificate_no, r.credit_hours, r.satisfaction_score, r.remark, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, p.plan_name, t.teacher_name from tea_training_result r left join tea_training_plan p on p.plan_id = r.plan_id left join tea_teacher t on t.teacher_id = r.teacher_id
mapper.insert: insert into tea_training_result(plan_id, teacher_id, exam_score, assessment_type, pass_status, certificate_no, credit_hours, satisfaction_score, remark, create_by, create_time )values(#{planId}, #{teacherId}, #{examScore}, #{assessmentType}, #{passStatus}, #{certificateNo}, #{creditHours}, #{satisfactionScore}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select t.teacher_id as teacherId, t.teacher_name as teacherName, d.dept_name as deptName, COALESCE(SUM(r.credit_hours), 0) as totalHours from tea_training_result r left join tea_teacher t on t.teacher_id = r.teacher_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = t.dept_id where r.pass_status = '1' AND r.teacher_id = #{teacherId} group by t.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, d.dept_name order by totalHours desc
